UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSBERY, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDELL, JAMES E. COLLINS, CLINTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 14 WOODWARD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
